---
title: "About"
---

About this site

## About Me

I am building a professional portfolio website with Quarto.

<div style="background-color:#f8f9fa; padding:20px; border-radius:10px; margin-top:20px;">
  <h3 style="color:#2c3e50; margin-top:0;">Welcome</h3>
  <p style="font-size:1.1em;">
    This section is styled using HTML and inline CSS inside a Quarto page.
  </p>
</div>
